creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 230606
devel/goreleaser: update to 1.2.5

A patch release.

Upstream changes since 1.2.2:

 - fix: logext STDERR use warn instead of error
 - fix: nfpm empty dirs
 - fix: sbom binary filter
 - fix: fix: artifacts.json should be 0644 instead of 0600

Changelog:	https://github.com/goreleaser/goreleaser/releases/tag/v1.2.3
Changelog:	https://github.com/goreleaser/goreleaser/releases/tag/v1.2.4
Changelog:	https://github.com/goreleaser/goreleaser/releases/tag/v1.2.5

Tested with Poudriere on armv7 arm64 FreeBSD 13.
Please MFH if possible.
